name: GNC Pets Advanced Immune Support Chicken Flavor Soft Chews Cat Supplement, 60 count
description: Help your fuzzy buddy battle back with GNC Pets Advanced Lysine Soft Chews. These supplements are purr-fect for cats over six months old. They are formulated to support immune system and respiratory functions using a blend of L-lysine, vitamin C and dried brewer’s yeast. These immune support chews are feature a delicious chicken flavor that’s kitty taste-tested and approved for your dude. They are crafted to be easy to swallow and ideal for cats who dislike taking pills.
